transcript: I’m here, I can hear you.
[laughs] Who are you trying to get a hold of?
I was sittin’ here watchin’ television and the phone rang.
Well that’s interesting. I’m sittin’ here talking to another salesman and our phone rang.
[to person in room] Here it is right here. [into phone] Frontier Wine and Liquor.
Okay, we got a problem. This is a liquor store and we think we’ve got some phones goin’ on. Where’re you at?
I’m in the Aurora mall, and I’m Frontier Leathers. [laughs]
You’re Frontier Leathers and we’re Frontier Liquor! Okay, hold on.
I’m the one that talked to ya earlier. This is... I don’t know what’s goin’ on but we just also got a call from Frontier Bar.
So there’s a...? Just a second, just a second! There’s a... there’s a Frontier Bar? I’m sorry, I’m talking to some customers, sir.
That’s alright. Yeah, I don’t know what’s goin’ on. Your phone rang and you picked it up, right?
Okay, mine rang and we picked it up. This is the second time you and I have spoken, I think.
'[sampled]' When Cindy get on the machine, when I get on the machine--
'[sampled]' --rgy, because when you intake that oxygen--
Well somethin’s goin’ on the fritz. I’ll just... I’ll call the phone company.
There’s something going on because every time my phone rings, it’s either you guys or Frontier Bar...
'[sampled]' Joanne, are you feeling sick, are you doing store? Are you feeling like you’re aging?
I’m sorry, man... [unclear] ...something wrong or somethin’.
Alright, well I’ll... I’ll call the phone company, take care of it.
This is The Frontier Club again.
No, this is Kat at The Frontier Club.
I wasn’t calling. Somebody was calling me.
Oh, no, I wasn’t. I just got a phone call comin’ in on my line, honey.
